heroHeadline: Two Battles for Culiacán: The Day the Cartel Beat the State — And the Rematch
heroSubtitle: Oct 2019: Military retreats after Sinaloa Cartel overwhelms city. Jan 2023: Ovidio Guzmán arrested amid mass urban firefight and extradited to the US.
footerNote: Data sourced from SEDENA, SSPC, DOJ, Reuters, AP, BBC, Animal Político, InSight Crime, ACLED, and Justice in Mexico.
